diagrams.title: Exception Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the complete hierarchy of exception classes in Java from Throwable root
diagrams.purpose: Understanding exception types and their inheritance relationships for proper exception handling

diagrams.title: Try-Catch-Finally Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing execution flow through try, catch and finally blocks
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how program control flows through exception handling blocks

diagrams.title: Exception Propagation Stack
diagrams.description: Call stack showing how exception propagates from method to method
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how exceptions move up the call stack when not caught locally
